title: AL's Skeletons Revamped x Fresh Animations
description: A pack that makes AL's Skeletons Revamped compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!
body:
![Skeletons Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07e8fa43cce25862d25c97d4431c4c4a5cc419f0.png)

# 

This pack makes AL's Skeletons Revamped compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!

 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WUuHEOkPho4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Since AL's Skeletons Revamped uses a custom model for it's Skeletons, on it's own, it is incompatible with Fresh Animations.

This addon pack fixes that with new models that use the appropriate animations!

 

Additionally, there are some extra animation features exclusive to this FA version like Skeletons SHATTERING upon death!

 

Important:

In order for this pack to work, you need to load it above FA.

Load them in order:

-This Pack

-Fresh Animations
